picks.quote: if he goes up against a guy like Hamza Chamay, I think Bo Nickel would just get flattened.
I don't think he can take down Vulk... I think Vulke has honestly probably better grappling and jiu-jitsu than Mavsar Evalev.
when it comes to guys like Vulcganowski who pushes the pace, I just don't think he's going to be able to keep up
